contents:
(** This file contains the definition of limits, and functoriality results on limits. *)

(** * Limits *)

(** A Limit is the extremity of a cone. *)
Arguments Build_IsLimit {G D Q} C H : rename.
Arguments islimit_cone {G D Q} C : rename.
Arguments islimit_unicone {G D Q} H : rename.
(** [cone_precompose_inv] is defined for convenience: it is only the inverse of [cone_precompose]. It allows to recover the map [h] from a cone [C']. *)
Definition cone_limit `(D : Diagram G) : Cone (Limit D) D.

goals.conclusion: Cone (Limit D) D
Cone (Limit D) D
forall i : G, Limit D -> D i
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), D _f g o ?legs i == ?legs j
forall i : G, Limit D -> D i
D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
D _f g o (fun (i0 : G) (x : Limit D) => lim x i0) i ==
(fun (i0 : G) (x : Limit D) => lim x i0) j
(D _f g) (lim x i) = lim x j

contents:
Instance unicone_limit `(D : Diagram G)
  : UniversalCone (cone_limit D).

goals.conclusion: UniversalCone (cone_limit D)
UniversalCone (cone_limit D)
IsEquiv (cone_precompose (cone_limit D))
Cone Y D -> Y -> Limit D
cone_precompose (cone_limit D) o ?g == idmap
?g o cone_precompose (cone_limit D) == idmap
Cone Y D -> Y -> Limit D
Limit D
forall i : G, D i
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (D _f g) (?lim i) = ?lim j
forall i : G, D i
D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
(D _f g) ((fun i0 : G => c i0 y) i) = (fun i0 : G => c i0 y) j
(D _f g) ((fun i0 : G => c i0 y) i) = (fun i0 : G => c i0 y) j

cone_precompose (cone_limit D)
o (fun (c : Cone Y D) (y : Y) =>
   {|
     lim := fun i : G => c i y;
     limp := fun (i j : G) (g : G i j) => legs_comm c i j g y
   |}) ==
idmap

(fun (c : Cone Y D) (y : Y) =>
 {|
   lim := fun i : G => c i y;
   limp := fun (i j : G) (g : G i j) => legs_comm c i j g y
 |})
o cone_precompose (cone_limit D) == idmap

contents:
Instance islimit_limit `(D : Diagram G) : IsLimit D (Limit D)
  := Build_IsLimit (cone_limit _) _.
(** Limits are preserved by composition with a (diagram) equivalence. *)

Definition islimit_precompose_equiv {D : Diagram G} `(f : Q <~> Q')
    : IsLimit D Q' -> IsLimit D Q.

goals.conclusion: IsLimit D Q' -> IsLimit D Q
IsLimit D Q' -> IsLimit D Q
IsLimit D Q
UniversalCone (cone_precompose HQ f)

contents:
Definition islimit_postcompose_equiv {D1 D2 : Diagram G} (m : D1 ~d~ D2)
    {Q : Type} : IsLimit D1 Q -> IsLimit D2 Q.

goals.conclusion: IsLimit D1 Q -> IsLimit D2 Q
IsLimit D1 Q -> IsLimit D2 Q
IsLimit D2 Q
UniversalCone (cone_postcompose m HQ)

contents: (** A diagram map [m] : [D1] => [D2] induces a map between any two limits of [D1] and [D2]. *)

Definition functor_limit {D1 D2 : Diagram G} (m : DiagramMap D1 D2)
    {Q1 Q2} (HQ1 : IsLimit D1 Q1) (HQ2 : IsLimit D2 Q2)
    : Q1 -> Q2 := cone_precompose_inv HQ2 (cone_postcompose m HQ1).
(** And this map commutes with diagram map. *)

(** ** Limits of equivalent diagrams *)

  (** Now we have than two equivalent diagrams have equivalent limits. *)

Context {D1 D2 : Diagram G} (m : D1 ~d~ D2) {Q1 Q2}
    (HQ1 : IsLimit D1 Q1) (HQ2 : IsLimit D2 Q2).

Definition functor_limit_eissect
    : functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2
      o functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 == idmap.

goals.conclusion:
functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 o functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 ==
idmap

functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 o functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 ==
idmap

(fun x : Q2 =>
 functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 (functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 x)) =
idmap
IsEquiv (cone_precompose HQ2)

cone_precompose HQ2
  (fun x : Q2 =>
   functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 (functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 x)) =
cone_precompose HQ2 idmap

cone_precompose HQ2
  (fun x : Q2 =>
   functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 (functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 x)) =
cone_precompose HQ2 idmap

cone_precompose HQ2
  (fun x : Q2 =>
   functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 (functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 x)) =
?Goal
?Goal = cone_precompose HQ2 idmap

cone_precompose HQ2
  (fun x : Q2 =>
   functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 (functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 x)) =
HQ2

cone_precompose HQ2
  (fun x : Q2 =>
   functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 (functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 x)) =
?Goal
?Goal = HQ2

cone_precompose (cone_precompose HQ2 (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2))
  (functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1) =
HQ2
cone_postcompose m (cone_postcompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2) = HQ2
cone_postcompose (diagram_idmap D2) HQ2 = HQ2

contents:
Definition functor_limit_eisretr
    : functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1
      o functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 == idmap.

goals.conclusion:
functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 o functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 ==
idmap

functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 o functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 ==
idmap

(fun x : Q1 =>
 functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 x)) =
idmap
IsEquiv (cone_precompose HQ1)

cone_precompose HQ1
  (fun x : Q1 =>
   functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 x)) =
cone_precompose HQ1 idmap

cone_precompose HQ1
  (fun x : Q1 =>
   functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 x)) =
cone_precompose HQ1 idmap

cone_precompose HQ1
  (fun x : Q1 =>
   functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 x)) =
?Goal
?Goal = cone_precompose HQ1 idmap

cone_precompose HQ1
  (fun x : Q1 =>
   functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 x)) =
HQ1

cone_precompose HQ1
  (fun x : Q1 =>
   functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1 (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2 x)) =
?Goal
?Goal = HQ1

cone_precompose
  (cone_precompose HQ1 (functor_limit (diagram_equiv_inv m) HQ2 HQ1))
  (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2) =
HQ1
cone_postcompose (diagram_equiv_inv m) (cone_postcompose m HQ1) = HQ1
cone_postcompose (diagram_idmap D1) HQ1 = HQ1

contents:
#[export] Instance isequiv_functor_limit
    : IsEquiv (functor_limit m HQ1 HQ2)
    := isequiv_adjointify _ _
      functor_limit_eissect functor_limit_eisretr.

Definition equiv_functor_limit : Q1 <~> Q2
    := Build_Equiv _ _ _ isequiv_functor_limit.

(** * Unicity of limits *)

(** A particular case of the functoriality result is that all limits of a diagram are equivalent (and hence equal in presence of univalence). *)

goals.conclusion: D ~d~ D

contents: (** * Limits are right adjoint to constant diagram *)

Theorem limit_adjoint {G : Graph} {D : Diagram G} {C : Type}
  : (C -> Limit D) <~> DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D.

goals.conclusion: (C -> Limit D) <~> DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D
(C -> Limit D) <~> DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D
(C -> Limit D) -> DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D
DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D -> C -> Limit D
?f o ?g == idmap
?g o ?f == idmap
(C -> Limit D) -> DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D
DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D
forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
(D _f g) (?DiagramMap_obj i x) =
?DiagramMap_obj j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)
forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i
D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
(D _f g) ((fun (i0 : G) (c : diagram_const C i0) => lim (f c) i0) i x) =
(fun (i0 : G) (c : diagram_const C i0) => lim (f c) i0) j
  (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)

(D _f g) ((fun (i0 : G) (c : diagram_const C i0) => lim (f c) i0) i x) =
(fun (i0 : G) (c : diagram_const C i0) => lim (f c) i0) j
  (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)
DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D -> C -> Limit D

(fun f : C -> Limit D =>
 {|
   DiagramMap_obj := fun (i : G) (c : diagram_const C i) => lim (f c) i;
   DiagramMap_comm :=
     fun (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i) =>
     limp (f (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)) i j g
 |})
o ?g == idmap

?g
o (fun f : C -> Limit D =>
   {|
     DiagramMap_obj := fun (i : G) (c : diagram_const C i) => lim (f c) i;
     DiagramMap_comm :=
       fun (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i) =>
       limp (f (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)) i j g
   |}) ==
idmap
DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D -> C -> Limit D
Limit D

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
(D _f g) (f i x) = f j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)

goals.conclusion: forall i : G, D i

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
(D _f g) (f i x) = f j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)

goals.conclusion: forall (i j : G) (g : G i j), (D _f g) (?lim i) = ?lim j

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
(D _f g) (f i x) = f j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)

goals.conclusion: forall i : G, D i

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
(D _f g) (f i x) = f j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)

goals.conclusion: D i

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : G, diagram_const C i0 -> D i0

forall (i0 j : G) (g : G i0 j) (x : diagram_const C i0),
(D _f g) (f i0 x) = f j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : G) (g : G i j),
(D _f g) ((fun i0 : G => f i0 c) i) = (fun i0 : G => f i0 c) j

hypotheses.type: forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i

forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
(D _f g) (f i x) = f j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)

goals.conclusion: (D _f g) ((fun i0 : G => f i0 c) i) = (fun i0 : G => f i0 c) j

hypotheses.type: forall i0 : G, diagram_const C i0 -> D i0

forall (i0 j0 : G) (g0 : G i0 j0) (x : diagram_const C i0),
(D _f g0) (f i0 x) = f j0 (((diagram_const C) _f g0) x)

goals.conclusion:
(fun f : C -> Limit D =>
 {|
   DiagramMap_obj := fun (i : G) (c : diagram_const C i) => lim (f c) i;
   DiagramMap_comm :=
     fun (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i) =>
     limp (f (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)) i j g
 |})
o (fun X : DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D =>
   (fun (f : forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i)
      (p : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
           (D _f g) (f i x) = f j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x))
      (c : C) =>
    {|
      lim := fun i : G => f i c;
      limp := fun (i j : G) (g : G i j) => p i j g c
    |}) X (DiagramMap_comm X)) ==
idmap

(fun X : DiagramMap (diagram_const C) D =>
 (fun (f : forall i : G, diagram_const C i -> D i)
    (p : forall (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i),
         (D _f g) (f i x) = f j (((diagram_const C) _f g) x))
    (c : C) =>
  {|
    lim := fun i : G => f i c; limp := fun (i j : G) (g : G i j) => p i j g c
  |}) X (DiagramMap_comm X))
o (fun f : C -> Limit D =>
   {|
     DiagramMap_obj := fun (i : G) (c : diagram_const C i) => lim (f c) i;
     DiagramMap_comm :=
       fun (i j : G) (g : G i j) (x : diagram_const C i) =>
       limp (f (((diagram_const C) _f g) x)) i j g
   |}) ==
idmap
